initiator: user request: address unverified claims from sweep review-walkthrough
scope_clarification: This is a first-class verification round, NOT a side-track. Addresses claims made in 2026-04-08T20-58-28 run-summary.md that were not independently verified during T1 triage. Outcome feeds back into sweep priorities before SEC-AUDIT-002..004 deep-dives proceed.
anti_scheinsicherheit_note: Every claim in the parent run-summary that mentions 'confirmed', 'verified', 'bound parameters', 'no exploit path' is re-checked against actual code in this run.
